Video.summary: Can our budget build rival a new Lexus?
Video.title: The Perfect Project Car?

Video.summary: Marc and Tommy plug a monster bowtie powerplant into the newly painted Chevelle Project.
Video.title: Highwayman Payoff and Chevelle Power Plant

Image.alt: Highwayman Payoff and Chevelle Power Plant
Highwayman Payoff and Chevelle Power Plant
Highwayman Payoff and Chevelle Power Plant

Video.summary: With a nod to the Grand National we’re giving our Buick Regal more Go Go.
Video.title: Race Inspired Fuel System for a Buick Regal

Image.alt: Race Inspired Fuel System for a Buick Regal
Race Inspired Fuel System for a Buick Regal
Race Inspired Fuel System for a Buick Regal

Video.summary: All of the mechanical and electrical systems are getting buttoned up on our '85 Buick Street Regal.
Video.title: Tips for Custom Brake Lines and Hoses

Image.alt: Tips for Custom Brake Lines and Hoses
Tips for Custom Brake Lines and Hoses
Tips for Custom Brake Lines and Hoses

Video.summary: The '85 Buick is ready for some fit and finish with body work and candy paint.
Video.title: How-To Body Prep and Lay Down Candy Paint

Image.alt: How-To Body Prep and Lay Down Candy Paint
How-To Body Prep and Lay Down Candy Paint
How-To Body Prep and Lay Down Candy Paint

Video.summary: Tommy and Marc give us some tips on painting trim and glass installation.
Video.title: Buick Regal Paint and Trim

Video.summary: We show you a few tips on wiring up your next project.
Video.title: Street Regal Wiring and Sound Proofing

Image.alt: Street Regal Wiring and Sound Proofing
Street Regal Wiring and Sound Proofing
Street Regal Wiring and Sound Proofing

Video.summary: Street Regal gets an updated custom interior to complement it' custom paint.
Video.title: Street Regal Interior/Payoff

Video.summary: Johnson's Hot Rod Shop's '32 Ford Roadster: a wild, hot pink, 500hp drivable masterpiece!
Video.title: Johnson Hot Rod - 32 Roadster

Video.summary: In the series launch we take a 1991 Chevy Suburban and transform it into ‘Project Unbreakable.’
Video.title: Project Unbreakable

Video.summary: It’s fabrication time on our Chevy Suburban we’re calling “Unbreakable”.
Video.title: Fab Four

Video.summary: Our GMC “Unbreakable” Suburban gets its new suspension.
Video.title: Suburban Suspension

Video.summary: Our “Unbreakable” Suburban gets its engine and transmission.
Video.title: Unbreakable Nears The Finish

Video.summary: Our Unbreakable Chevy Suburban makes its final preparations for payoff.
Video.title: Unbreakable Readies For The Mountain

Video.summary: The guys put Project Unbreakable, our ’91 Chevy Suburban, to the test at Adventure Off Road Park!
Video.title: The Unbreakable Suburban is Going Off Road

Image.alt: The Unbreakable Suburban is Going Off Road
The Unbreakable Suburban is Going Off Road
The Unbreakable Suburban is Going Off Road

Video.summary: Come along as we take a massive ‘91 GMC Suburban square body and turn it into a lifted off-road beast.
Video.title: An Unbreakable Suburban Transformation

Video.summary: With new wheels and tires and steering upgrade, the guys take their Chevy Suburban for a drive!
Video.title: Unbreakable Suburban Comes To Life

Video.summary: Is custom exhaust worth it on a budget build?
Video.title: Tune & Tone

Video.summary: The crew makes the ultimate conversion by taking a 2007 2-wheel drive Jeep Wrangler and converting it to 4WD.
Video.title: Wrangler Re-Do

Video.summary: The front and rear suspension go bye-bye on our Dodge Dart.
Video.title: Pro Street Dodge Suspension

Video.summary: The Pro Street Dodge gets a gnarly-looking blown Hemi wedged into it's engine bay.
Video.title: Blown Hemi Shoehorn

Video.summary: The Pro Street Dodge Dart gets a fuel system, and the guys go over safety equipment.
Video.title: Dodge Dart Fuel and Fire

Video.summary: The 1974 Pro Street Dodge Dart, undergoes body and paint work, along with custom graphics.
Video.title: Pro Street Dodge Paint and Graphics

Image.alt: Pro Street Dodge Paint and Graphics
Pro Street Dodge Paint and Graphics
Pro Street Dodge Paint and Graphics

Video.summary: The Pro Street Dodge Dart, Project Business Time is ready to roll!
Video.title: It's Business Time!

Video.summary: Building a big block bow tie classic on a shoestring budget.
Video.title: 454 Budget Build

Video.summary: Chevy vs. Ford in a horsepower battle of the big blocks.
Video.title: 454 Power Build

Video.summary: Making a modern day muscle car with 454-powered 1985 Monte Carlo.
Video.title: 454 meet '85 Monte Carlo

Video.summary: We introduce our '89 Blazer with a raucous trail ride to show capabilities of Chevy's full size 4x4.
Video.title: Klassy K5 Introduction & Teardown

Video.summary: The Blazer gets stripped to bare metal and our SuperMax Silverado is treated to front suspension upgrades.
Video.title: Klassy K5 Blast & Body Work, Silverado IFS Upgrades

Image.alt: Klassy K5 Blast & Body Work, Silverado IFS Upgrades
Klassy K5 Blast & Body Work, Silverado IFS Upgrades
Klassy K5 Blast & Body Work, Silverado IFS Upgrades

Video.summary: Restoration of our 89 Blazer continues by stripping the frame bare and repairing the damage.
Video.title: Klassy K5 Frame Repair, Axles

Video.summary: Our '89 blazer frame is back from powdercoat where it can be turned into a rolling chassis.
Video.title: Klassy K5 Rolling Chassis

Video.summary: The '89 Blazer 4x4 returns for lockers in the rear - and new gearing up front, along with steering upgrades
Video.title: Klassy K5 Axle Rebuild

Video.summary: After months of prep, the '89 Blazer hits the paint booth for a custom mix of color.
Video.title: Chevy Blazer Custom Paint

Video.summary: Klassy K5 returns from fresh paint for re-assembly, and interior goodies.
Video.title: Chevy Blazer Assembly/Interior

Video.summary: The supercharged big block Blazer hits the trails in search of a big mud hole.
Video.title: Supercharged '89 K5 Square Body Searches For a Mud Hole

Image.alt: Supercharged '89 K5 Square Body Searches For a Mud Hole
Supercharged '89 K5 Square Body Searches For a Mud Hole
Supercharged '89 K5 Square Body Searches For a Mud Hole

Video.summary: Neither snow nor rain nor heat nor gloom of night will keep our guys from their special delivery.
Video.title: Mail Jeep

Video.summary: See if your top ten muscle car list matches ours.
Video.title: Top 10 American Muscle Part 1

Video.summary: Have we missed any? Here is the conclusion of our top 10 American Muscle Cars.
Video.title: Top 10 American Muscle Part 2

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle guys slam over a 1,000 horsepower into a huge mid-70’s Mercury with a sadistic streak.
Video.title: The Highwayman: Marquis to the Max

Image.alt: The Highwayman: Marquis to the Max
The Highwayman: Marquis to the Max
The Highwayman: Marquis to the Max

Video.summary: The Mercury build continues with ignition, exhaust upgrade and fuel system to handle a 1000 horsepower.
Video.title: The Highwayman: Part II

Video.summary: Adding an indestructible 9-inch and air suspension to our sleeper 1,080-horse ’72 Marquis Brougham
Video.title: The Highwayman: Monster Mercury

Video.summary: The guys button up the last few details on their 1100 horsepower Mercury Monster and take her for a spin.
Video.title: The Highwayman - Odds & Ends

Video.summary: We're testing our new C-10 project, putting this old Chevy on a wild ride to plan our custom cruiser upgrades.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender
Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender
Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender

Video.summary: We begin teardown of our Chevy C-10 and mockup the new suspension for better handling.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation
Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation
Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation

Video.summary: We convert a long bed to short bed and install a rear step notch to drop our C-10
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice
Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice
Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice

Video.summary: We shorten Cream Puff's frame, show you our short bed options, and then start the new bed assembly.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed
Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed
Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed

Video.summary: We build a trans tunnel and wheel tubs in our 72 Super Cheyenne for a lowered stance.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 5: Tunnel Vision

Video.summary: We clean up our 1972 C-10 front end with relocated hood hinges and a custom bed frame.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 6: Bed Redefined

Video.summary: We install the engine and trans, make brake lines, then fab a clean, simple exhaust on our 1972 C-10.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 7: Powertrain to Pipework

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 7: Powertrain to Pipework
Chevy C-10 - Part 7: Powertrain to Pipework
Chevy C-10 - Part 7: Powertrain to Pipework

Video.summary: We take a '89 full size 4x4 Chevy Blazer on a trail ride, then tear it down and build the ultimate truck.
Video.title: Klassy K5

Video.summary: It's an OBS Chevy K1500 4WD we converted to AWD, slammed, and LS swapped!
Video.title: Chevy K1500 Red Tide

Video.summary: Brian and Jason unbox a budget 2011 Lexus IS 250 body kit from China. Will it fit or need cutting?
Video.title: Body Kit Bolt Ons

Video.summary: We begin the transformation of a tired 1970 Monte Carlo into a modernized G-Machine.
Video.title: '70 Monte Carlo Part 1

Video.summary: MuscleCar gets a hand from HorsePower Mike in stiffening the frame on the Monte Carlo G-Machine.
Video.title: 70 Monte Carlo Part 2

Video.summary: MuscleCar demonstrates how to get rid of a gnarly old Vinyl Top on the Monte Carlo G-Machine.
Video.title: 70 Monte Carlo Part 3

Video.summary: It's time for the finishing touches on the Monte Carlo G-Machine.
Video.title: 70 Monte Carlo Finale
